message:
feat(engine): validation hardening, error code format checks, and corpus verification

ambient_authority:
- Handle char literal containing double-quote ('"') and byte char (b'"')
  in sanitized_code_portion to prevent false string-state transitions

cross_repo_contract:
- verify_error_code_format() now enforces non-empty inputs, requires
  separator after prefix, and validates suffix is alphanumeric — was
  previously a bare starts_with check

esm_cjs_interop_parity:
- contract_satisfied() now validates schema_version, component, and
  verifies specimen_count matches the canonical corpus length

module_resolver:
- Additional resolution edge case handling

benchmark_freshness_gate:
- Test refactoring to use struct-update syntax

versioned_rewrite_pack:
- Extended pack analysis and enrichment tests

test262_release_gate:
- High-water mark and run-date validation enhancements

frankenctl + franken_test262_runner:
- parse_run_date() validation for --run-date CLI argument
- NaiveDate-based date parsing

Tests expanded across all affected subsystems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
